(aWTR'Ff WTftJj)................... ......... ^ f t r < ^ ^ q ^ E T ^ ^ ) ............ wrn 2 OT wrc f^fiirfij-iTf fir?r'p srsfVT jPTP’Tqw Pprr 'RT ^ i 1, ^ 'T^rf^ arfwpTJm, 1952 ^ arat^ (snrm) fwT, 1983 fttTJr 35 % «rtfi'^ >;^rj 2 . ^ 5nTT®r q ^ ^ j f r f w r P s f t >pt ^ | -- 5 of 12 -- THE GAZETTE OF INDIA ; EXTRAORDINARY [Pa r t II^Sec. 3(i)} 3 . i> r ^ m r 4 . ^ rrrfTw: [TTr^5(i^T 805/2/83-^7^ (^)] ft r?T? ^rPflr^ MINISTRY OF INFORMATION AND BROAD CASTING NOTIflCATlON New Delhi, the 28th February. 1984 G.S.R. 83(E).— lu exorcise of the powers con ferred by section 8 of the Cinematograph Act, 1952 (37 of 1952), the Central Govemffient hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Cinema tograph (Certification) Rules, 1983", namely :— 1.
